##NAMES=Glaucophane
##RRUFFID=R120002
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=[box]Na_2_(Mg_3_Al_2_)Si_8_O_22_(OH)_2_
##LOCALITY=Cape Marmari, Grammata Bay, Syros Island, Aegean Sea, Greece
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Gunnar Farber
##DESCRIPTION=Dark green bladed, associated with colorless quartz

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
